sections.section_purpose: To detail the technical aspects and requirements of the proposed solution.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the services will be delivered in alignment with ITIL v4 and manage Commonwealth server, network, and Application Software.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the management and governance structures supporting the project.
sections.response_guidance: Explain the performance management, planning, meeting schedules, and reporting requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate the supplier's corporate capabilities and compliance with industry standards.
sections.response_guidance: Provide details on the AIC obligations and how they will be met.

sections.section_purpose: To address the commercial aspects of the proposal, including pricing and compliance with tender requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Include pricing information, evaluation criteria, and any alternative proposals.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure compliance with legal and policy requirements.
sections.response_guidance: State compliance with legal requirements, intellectual property management, and additional standards.
